The match schedule was released on 1 July 2025. Atlético entered the tournament in the round of 32, as they qualified for the 2026 Supercopa de España.

web_results.title: 2025–26 La Liga - Wikipedia
web_results.description: ^ The 2025–26 Copa del Rey winners also qualify for the Europa League league phase. If the Copa del Rey winners finish in the top five, the Europa League spot will be passed to the sixth-placed team. If the Copa del Rey winners finish in the top six, the Conference League spot will be passed to the seventh-placed team. ... Updated to match(es) played on 27 February 2026. Source: La Liga Legend: Blue = home team win; Yellow = draw; Red = away team win.

web_results.title: Why Barcelona Will Win La Liga 2025-26 and Real Madrid and Atletico Won't
web_results.description: In every La Liga season but one since 2012-13, the top three spots have been claimed by Atletico Madrid, Real Madrid and Barcelona, in one order or another. There's no suggestion it will go any other way in 2025-26, especially with Girona dropping ...
